source: Cached demo dataset shaped like Apple US App Store reviews. Use live Apple RSS when network is available.

reviews.title: Great workouts but the trial confused me
reviews.content: The exercises are good and easy to follow, but I thought I was starting a free plan and then subscription screens kept appearing. I need clearer pricing before committing.
reviews.author: demo-user-1

reviews.title: Too many paywalls
reviews.content: I wanted beginner home workouts but most things I tapped led to premium. The app should show what is free and what is paid before I build a plan.
reviews.author: demo-user-2

reviews.title: Beginner mode moves too fast
reviews.content: The workout timer jumps to the next move before I understand the posture. I wish there were slower transitions and better previews for beginners.
reviews.author: demo-user-3

reviews.title: Love the short sessions
reviews.content: The 7 minute workouts help me stay consistent. I like the voice prompts and the simple plan.
reviews.author: demo-user-4

reviews.title: Hard to cancel
reviews.content: The subscription was hard to understand and I could not find where to cancel. This made me nervous about trying premium again.
reviews.author: demo-user-5

reviews.title: Needs knee friendly options
reviews.content: Some exercises are painful for my knees. I need swaps or a low impact filter so I can complete a workout safely.
reviews.author: demo-user-6

reviews.title: Progress disappeared
reviews.content: After the latest update my workout streak disappeared. I still like the workouts but losing progress was frustrating.
reviews.author: demo-user-7

reviews.title: Good premium plan
reviews.content: I paid for premium and the meal plan plus workouts are worth it. The subscription screen was clear for me.
reviews.author: demo-user-8

reviews.title: Audio cues overlap music
reviews.content: The voice coach is helpful, but the audio sometimes overlaps with my music and I miss the next exercise instruction.
reviews.author: demo-user-9

reviews.title: No equipment filter is useful
reviews.content: I like that I can work out at home without equipment. Please keep adding beginner routines.
reviews.author: demo-user-10

reviews.title: Plan does not adapt
reviews.content: When I skip a day the plan does not adapt. It either makes me feel behind or repeats workouts that are too hard.
reviews.author: demo-user-11

reviews.title: Language mix in instructions
reviews.content: Some exercise names showed in another language after update. It made the workout hard to follow.
reviews.author: demo-user-12
